outfit_info.outfit_description: A young model sports a relaxed, youthful ensemble featuring a white graphic tee layered with a classic blue denim jacket. Light wash denim shorts and comfortable sneakers complete this casual, effortless look, topped with a white baseball cap, perfect for an urban setting.

model_attributes.body: A young boy with a lean physique, displaying a direct and serious demeanor.
model_attributes.pose: Standing upright with hands in pockets, facing forward with a steady, confident posture.
model_attributes.background: A grungy, graffiti-covered stage featuring eerie puppet figures and discarded items, creating an urban, slightly dark atmosphere.
